suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure implementation features always map to an installed skill (or standardize on an always-available fallback) so workers do not proceed after a missing-skill error.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for f-mcp-manager reported 'Skill "worker" not found' in worker transcript skeleton while implementation still proceeded.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update scrutiny reviewer procedure/prompt to avoid hard dependency on .factory/library/architecture.md unless guaranteed to exist, or add a fallback check.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review shared-state observation noted .factory/library/architecture.md missing while reviewer guidance expected it.
